Place your Andaman hero video here as: andaman-hero.mp4

Video requirements:
- Format: MP4 (H.264 codec)
- Duration: 15-60 seconds (it will loop)
- Resolution: 1920x1080 minimum
- File size: Under 20MB recommended

The video should show beautiful Andaman scenes:
- Turquoise waters and beaches
- Underwater coral reefs
- Island aerial views
- Radhanagar Beach, Havelock

If no video is present, the site falls back to a beautiful blue ocean gradient.
